mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pms_member_price (product_id, member_level_id, member_price, member_level_name) values (#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberLevelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{memberLevelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pms_member_price
product_id,
member_level_id,
member_price,
member_level_name,
#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberLevelId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{memberLevelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update pms_member_price
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
member_level_id = #{memberLevelId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
member_price = #{memberPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
member_level_name = #{memberLevelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pms_member_price (product_id, member_level_id, member_price,member_level_name) VALUES
(#{item.productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.memberLevelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.memberPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.memberLevelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
